testcase.name: test_refresh_token_returns_new_token

failure.message: AssertionError: New token should be different from old token assert 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI3Y2Y0MzMxMC1jMTRjLTQ1ZDAtYWEyZC02ZWI5OWIwNGVhMWIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImthbHlhbkB3aXNlZHJpdmUuY29tIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNDUxNTIxfQ.wsIKb6qWSWtcugq8hzPuIa3iybih0Hn-_-EmpSLQbL4' != 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI3Y2Y0MzMxMC1jMTRjLTQ1ZDAtYWEyZC02ZWI5OWIwNGVhMWIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImthbHlhbkB3aXNlZHJpdmUuY29tIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNDUxNTIxfQ.wsIKb6qWSWtcugq8hzPuIa3iybih0Hn-_-EmpSLQbL4'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_loans_features_iteration82.py:78: in test_refresh_token_returns_new_token assert new_token != admin_token, "New token should be different from old token" E AssertionError: New token should be different from old token E assert 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI3Y2Y0MzMxMC1jMTRjLTQ1ZDAtYWEyZC02ZWI5OWIwNGVhMWIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImthbHlhbkB3aXNlZHJpdmUuY29tIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNDUxNTIxfQ.wsIKb6qWSWtcugq8hzPuIa3iybih0Hn-_-EmpSLQbL4' != 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI3Y2Y0MzMxMC1jMTRjLTQ1ZDAtYWEyZC02ZWI5OWIwNGVhMWIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImthbHlhbkB3aXNlZHJpdmUuY29tIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNDUxNTIxfQ.wsIKb6qWSWtcugq8hzPuIa3iybih0Hn-_-EmpSLQbL4'
